testcase.system-out: External link security: 0/5 links have proper rel attributes
testcase.system-err: ⚠️ SECURITY ISSUE: No external links with target="_blank" have rel="noopener" or "noreferrer" attributes ⚠️ RECOMMENDATION: Add rel="noopener noreferrer" to external links for security

testcase.name: 9. Content Integrity & Security - Real Features › 9.8 Form Security
